race.description: Final Stage Selling Now Country Boosted Maiden Handicap
race.comment: SHERIFF'S STAR (8) his two runs back have had merit and will find this more to his liking. Beaten for early speed and closed late when fifth over 1200m at Doomben. Won't find this as tough and the tongue-tie comes off. VARAZZE (12) drops sharply in weight today and is proven at the trip. Held her own through the line when sixth over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Rates highly in this field with Smyth's claim. FOXY ARTIST (1) talented gelding with his hoof on the till. Fitter now third-up after jumping in trip with a tough third over 1400m at Grafton. Key jockey change and can get the job done from the good gate. GAELIC REWARD (7) worked hard from the wide gate at her third race start with a fading seventh over 1400m at this track. Improver.
